title: 1946: Dawn of Cold War
description:
[V5.4] [READ DESCRIPTION BELOW]

'From Stettin to Adriatic... An Iron Curtain has descended...'

<---------------------------------------------------->

CRITICAL NOTE: As of May 12 2026, the Pro AI model has been broken/lobotomized and will spout long length random nonsense even to simple requests and this is a sitewide problem, I recommend that you don't play with Pro AI at the moment.

<---------------------------------------------------->

**Milestones**

**100K Plays ***- May 5 '26*

**1M Rounds **- *May 12 '26*

<---------------------------------------------------->

<---------------------------------------------------->

**Hall of Fame**

< Drew Durnil: Special Thanks for [*shoutout!*](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2CAmdHWsYYE) >

<---------------------------------------------------->

USER NOTE: Many people are pointing out the flaws in there gameplay, Keep in mind that the flawed gameplay is caused by the AI model you are playing with and I have to say that only play with standard Pax models like: **Light**, **Pro** and **Max** models which are Gemini models basically, these models are known for their stability.

I do not recommend using free models as they can get rate-limited often and can ruin experience, also if sometimes generation is glitched then try refreshing the Window or go to cheat menu and revert to previous turn, thanks.

Additionally, Claude models like Opus and Sonnet really work well with the preset and are detailed however expensive (so use at your own expense).

4.changeLog: Added some tags, fixed borders, fixed color palettes a bit

12.changeLog:
Added (French) Algeria
Border Adjustments for Iranian Soviet States
Added Mandatory Palestine

64.changeLog:
Relocated devlog!

[V4.1.1 Update]
Devlog, V1.1: Changed Map

V2.2: Partitioned Vietnam, Partitioned Borneo, Aded Brunei, Jerusalem is fixed, Manchuria border adjustment

V2.4: Australia border fix, description change, North Africa change

V2.5: Nigeria, South Africa, Ethiopia changes
V2.5.1: Banner change
V2.6: Flag update, added flags for most major states
V2.6.1: More flags

V2.8.2: Flag updates, Africa countries adjustment

V2.8.4: desc clearing
V2.8.5: desc clearing and map adjustment
V2.9: added Brazil territories
V3.0: map changes, added military units around the world, Mexico and Portugal overhaul, added Ireland historical provinces
V3.1: desc refining.
V3.2: added some seas
V3.2.1: desc refining
V3.3: Map clock is now set to June, some map changes, UN now has its own territory

V3.7: Map change, desc
V4.0: Fixed alotta things in map, desc changes
V4.1: added more flags, desc changes. (date: 25 FEB 2026)

66.changeLog: Fixed Central Africa Borders, Added Burkina Faso, Added Egypt Governorates; Hawaii and Alaska are now de-facto separate (accurate historically since they were ICs till 1959)

69.changeLog: Brazil has some more states now, minor map change

71.changeLog: Greek coast refinement and Turkish coast refinement

73.changeLog: Coastal refinement of Western Britain and Island

75.changeLog: Islands, coastline refinement, Azerbaijan-Armenia border refinement.

78.changeLog: Subcontinent overhaul, more Mexican states, more Egyptian governorates, some Syrian provinces, Saudi border fix
